notes: Official commission transcript spells the name McGhie in the PUBLIC SPEAKERS roster, in every speaker label (MR. McGHIE), and in his own introduction: "My name is Troy McGhie." Our Whisper transcript had rendered it phonetically as McGee.

Official transcript roster, speaker labels (MS. NIGHTSTAR) and self-introduction give Krystal with a K: "My name is Krystal Nightstar and I've worked for the City of New York." Whisper had rendered it Crystal.
Spelling confirmed by the official transcript roster, speaker labels and self-introduction ("My name is Saul Porter"), matching our Whisper transcript. Raised medium -> high.

Official transcript roster lists Emilina Wilson, matching our Whisper transcript independently; the chair addresses her as Emilina and speaker labels read MS. WILSON. She does not spell the name herself and no independent public record was found, so raised low -> medium rather than high.
